title: CodeSet
description: A business reference data set (e.g., country_iso, ifrs9_stages, position_system_matrix). The CodeSet itself stores only metadata; items live in CodeSetVersion.items. See SPEC §3.4.

name.description: Stable machine name within the domain. Forms the OM FQN 'rdmmesh.<domain>.<codeset>'.

references.description: Cross-codeset foreign-key references. Each entry links a column of THIS CodeSet (a key part name or an attribute name) to a column of another CodeSet, so consumers (e.g. the OpenMetadata catalog) can render the relationship and join the reference tables. Backend does not enforce referential integrity in this slice; the OM ingestion source emits these as FOREIGN_KEY tableConstraints.

from_column.description: Column on THIS CodeSet — a key part name (key_spec.parts[].name) or an attribute name (CodeSetSchema property).

to_codeset_id.description: Referenced CodeSet. May live in another domain.

to_column.description: Column on the referenced CodeSet that from_column points at (typically its key part).

label.description: Optional human label for the relationship.

current_published_version.description: Cached pointer to the latest PUBLISHED version. NULL until first publish.
